introSection: Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. The ride will be themed after the superhero Spider-Man.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was announced on 10 August 2024.

Track was spotted for the ride by 10 June 2025.

fullText:
Unknown is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Shanghai Disneyland in Pudong, Shanghai, China. The ride will be themed after the superhero Spider-Man.

The ride was announced on 10 August 2024.

Track was spotted for the ride by 10 June 2025.
